_note: Fase 1 - VisualParity V3.1 lockfile. The vp_build_sha256 field is a placeholder until the CLI binary is built and its real hash is computed. The harness v3 bundle_verifier.py treats any vp_build_sha256 NOT in this allowlist as BLOCK.

allowlist.note: Scaffold only. The CLI binary has not been built yet. Once built in a later fase, replace 'unbuilt-fase-1-scaffold' with the real SHA256 of the published visualparity binary and bump lockfile_version.
